title: koanophyllon jinotegense
intro: Koanophyllon jinotegense is a plant species, also known as Guanacaste or Jinotega guanacaste, that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Koanophyllon jinotegense include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to reduce congestion and promote coughing up mucus. Koanophyllon jinotegense is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
